blocks.text: Amanda Compton, Director of Operations, Gutierrez-Murphy

Thank you for the confidence you and your colleagues have shown in our firm. This letter confirms the terms on which Gladepoint Strategies LLC will carry out an operating model redesign for {{fact:f:E-2025-001.client}}. The work will begin on {{fact:f:E-2025-001.start}} and run approximately three months.

Our scope is the one we discussed in your offices. We will assess how the operations organization works today, design a future-state model with a clear structure and clear decision rights, and leave your team a transition plan it can execute without us. The work falls into three phases, assessment, design, and transition planning, and you will see our thinking as it forms. We do not save findings for a final reveal, and we will tell you plainly if the facts point somewhere uncomfortable.

Caroline Mayo, Principal, will lead the engagement day to day and should be your first call on any matter of substance. John Johnson, Senior Analyst, will build the fact base and will work directly with the people who own your data. I will read everything that carries our name before it reaches you, and I will join each steering discussion.

Our fee for this engagement is {{fact:f:E-2025-001.fee}}, fixed, covering all professional time and invoiced monthly in equal installments. Reasonable out-of-pocket expenses, if any, will be billed at cost with receipts. Should the scope change, we will agree on the change in writing before we do the work, not after.

We keep this firm small on purpose. Each client gets our full attention, and Gutierrez-Murphy will have ours. If these terms are acceptable, please sign below and return one copy; we will take care of the rest.
